languages.text: "Дам по пистолету. Но если еще раз боевое оружие потеряете, доложу Батошски!"

traits.locale_text: "Дам по пистолету. Но если еще раз боевое оружие потеряете, доложу Батошски!"

languages.text: "I'll give you a pistol. But lose your combat weapon again and I'm telling Batoshski!"
languages.original_text: "Дам по пистолету. Но если еще раз боевое оружие потеряете, доложу Батошски!"

traits.locale_text: "I'll give you pistols. But lose your combat weapons again and I'm telling Batoshski!"
"I'll give you pistols. But lose your combat weapons again and I'm telling Batoshski!"
"I'll give you a pistol. But lose your combat weapon again and I'm telling Batoshski!"
"I'll give you a pistol. But lose your combat weapon again and I'm telling Batoshski!"

languages.text: “我会给你一把手枪。但你要是再把作战武器弄丢，我就去告诉巴托什斯基！”
languages.original_text: "I'll give you a pistol. But lose your combat weapon again and I'm telling Batoshski!"

traits.locale_text: “我会给你一把手枪。但你要是再把作战武器弄丢，我就去告诉巴托什斯基！”

languages.text: «Te daré una pistola, pero ¡como vuelvas a perder tu arma de combate, este asunto llegará hasta Batoshski!».
languages.original_text: "I'll give you a pistol. But lose your combat weapon again and I'm telling Batoshski!"

traits.locale_text: «Te daré una pistola, pero ¡como vuelvas a perder tu arma de combate, este asunto llegará hasta Batoshski!».

languages.text: « Je vais te filer un pistolet. Mais si tu perds encore ton arme, j'en informerai Batoshski ! »
languages.original_text: "I'll give you a pistol. But lose your combat weapon again and I'm telling Batoshski!"

traits.locale_text: « Je vais te filer un pistolet. Mais si tu perds encore ton arme, j'en informerai Batoshski ! »

languages.text: "Sana bir tabanca vereceğim. Ama çatışma silahını bir daha kaybedersen Batoshski'ye söylerim!"
languages.original_text: "I'll give you a pistol. But lose your combat weapon again and I'm telling Batoshski!"

traits.locale_text: "Sana bir tabanca vereceğim. Ama çatışma silahını bir daha kaybedersen Batoshski'ye söylerim!"

languages.text: "Ich geb dir 'ne Pistole. Aber wenn du deine Waffe noch mal verlierst, informiere ich Batoshski!"
languages.original_text: "I'll give you a pistol. But lose your combat weapon again and I'm telling Batoshski!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich geb dir 'ne Pistole. Aber wenn du deine Waffe noch mal verlierst, informiere ich Batoshski!"

languages.text: 「ピストルをくれてやる。だが、また得物をなくしやがったら、バトシュスキーに言いつけるからな！」
languages.original_text: "I'll give you a pistol. But lose your combat weapon again and I'm telling Batoshski!"

traits.locale_text: 「ピストルをくれてやる。だが、また得物をなくしやがったら、バトシュスキーに言いつけるからな！」
